division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
text: This article shall become operative on July 1, 1993.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 2. Transfers of Title or Interest [5600 - 6105]
#### Article 5. Transfers Through Wholesale Auctions [6100 - 6105]
##### § 6105

This article shall become operative on July 1, 1993.

*(Added by Stats. 1992, Ch. 745, Sec. 6. Effective January 1, 1993. Note: This section prescribes a delayed operative date (July 1, 1993) for Article 5, commencing with Section 6100.)*

subsections.text: This article shall become operative on July 1, 1993.
